title: Negative pack gap — block suspending/disabling the last active super admin (GLOBAL-RBAC-003 / WF-012-NEG-002)
business_reason: Removing the final super admin would lock the organisation out of all governance (approvals, role changes, security). The negative pack requires this be blocked with an explicit error + audit.

design.hook: NEW server/lib/customPreconditions.ts — hand-written transition preconditions the kernel runs ALONGSIDE the generated transitionPreconditions (mirrors the generated+hand-written domainEffects merge). Fail-closed.
design.guard: staff_users:suspend and staff_users:archive call assertNotLastSuperAdmin — if the target's primary_role is super_admin and they are the last active one (PURE isLastActiveSuperAdmin), throw PreconditionError -> 422 ValidationError. The kernel already wraps preconditions fail-closed.
design.kernel: defineModule transition path now awaits runCustomPreconditions after runPreconditions inside the same fail-closed try/catch.

param_14.question: Can the last super admin be removed?
param_14.answer: No. Suspending or disabling a super admin is blocked when they are the last active one — the kernel runs a fail-closed precondition that counts active super admins and rejects the transition with an explicit error. The account stays active; nothing is partially applied.
param_14.answer_source: customPreconditions.ts, defineModule transition preconditions, negative pack GLOBAL-RBAC-003 / WF-012-NEG-002
param_14.security_implications: prevents an org-wide governance lockout (no super admin -> no approvals/role-changes/security actions); fail-closed (if the count can't be evaluated the transition is blocked); pure core is unit-tested.
param_14.approval_implications: to remove a super admin, another must be active first.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: extend to role-DOWNGRADE paths (changing primary_role away from super_admin) once a direct staff-role-edit endpoint exists; same guard for 'disabled' transitions if added.

verify: full e2e regression (kernel transition path touched)
